export { AnimatedToc } from './animated-toc'
export { SegmentedToc } from './segmented-toc'
export { SegmentedProgressBar } from './segmented-progress-bar'
export * as DemoHelpers from './demo-helpers'

export const metadata = {
  id: 'toc',
  name: 'Table of Contents',
  description: 'Interactive TOC with animated progress indicators and hierarchical paths.',
} as const
